steps.expected: Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive
steps.observed: Response headers included Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive

steps.action: Keep SSE connection open and observe stream
steps.expected: Heartbeat/ping received and connection stays open
steps.observed: Received ping event: event: ping / data: {"type":"ping"} while stream remained open

steps.action: Create session g3-sse-test-1 while SSE connected

evidence.headers: HTTP/1.1 200 OK; Content-Type: text/event-stream; Cache-Control: no-cache; Connection: keep-alive

steps.action: Connect SSE to /api/workspaces/default/events and create session g3-sse-test-1
steps.expected: Events reference sessions in default workspace
steps.observed: session_created event referenced session-1; GET /api/sessions/session-1 shows workspaceId: default

evidence.events: SSE stream contained session_created events for session-1 and session-3 created in default workspace

assertions.title: Multiple SSE clients receive same events

steps.action: Open two concurrent SSE connections to /api/workspaces/default/events
steps.expected: Both streams receive the same session_created event
steps.observed: Both SSE clients received session_created for session-3 after creating g3-sse-test-2

evidence.events: Client A log: session_created session-3; Client B log: session_created session-3

summary: Tested SSE transport and scoping assertions: headers and heartbeat verified, events tied to default workspace, and concurrent SSE clients both received the same session_created event.
